# context-stack

> Canonical coordination layer for three sibling open-source AI governance projects: ContextOps, ContextBoundary, and Sthala.

context-stack holds the locked terminology, cross-project decisions, and family framing for the AI governance stack at github.com/kannanokannan. It does not contain implementation detail — that lives in each project repo.

License: Apache 2.0.

## This repo

- [README.md](https://github.com/kannanokannan/context-stack/blob/main/README.md): Family overview and project relationships
- [GLOSSARY.md](https://github.com/kannanokannan/context-stack/blob/main/GLOSSARY.md): Canonical terminology — single source of truth for all terms across all three projects
- [DECISIONS.md](https://github.com/kannanokannan/context-stack/blob/main/DECISIONS.md): Locked cross-project decisions with dates
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/kannanokannan/context-stack/blob/main/CLAUDE.md): Agent briefing for working across the stack

## The three projects

- [ContextOps](https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextOps): How does an org govern its AI context? — v0.1 active
- [ContextBoundary](https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextBoundary): Where is data allowed to go? — v0.1 active
- [Sthala](https://github.com/kannanokannan/Sthala): Where does the AI actually run? — v0.1 Alpha
